ModMetaData.name: Pawn Diary
ModMetaData.author: Aimml
ModMetaData.description:
Pawn Diary gives RimWorld colonists a private journal. It watches important colony moments - social interactions, fights, mental breaks, raids, work, thoughts, arrivals, deaths, and more - then asks a local or OpenAI-compatible language model to turn them into short diary pages in each pawn's own voice.
Entries appear in a Diary tab beside Social. The mod is storytelling only: it does not change gameplay mechanics, and it is built for compact prompts that work well with local LLM tools such as LM Studio, llama.cpp, and Ollama.
